title: Notification No.90/2014-Cus(NT),dt. 26.9.2014
text: [To be published in the Gazette of India, Extraordinary, Part II, Section 3, Sub-section (ii)] Government of India Ministry of Finance (Department of Revenue) Notification No.90/2014-Customs (N.T.) New Delhi, 26th September, 2014 S.O. (E). - In exercise of the powers conferred by sub-section (1) of section 4 and sub- section (1) of section 5 of the Customs Act, 1962 (52 of 1962), the Central Board of Excise and Customs hereby appoints the Additional Commissioner or Joint Commissioner of Customs, Custom House, Near All India Radio, Navrangpura, Ahmedabad to act as a common adjudicating authority to exercise the powers and discharge the duties conferred or imposed on- (i) the Additional Commissioner or Joint Commissioner of Customs, Custom House, Near All India Radio Navrangpura, Ahmedabad; (ii ) the Additional Commissioner or Joint Commissioner of Customs, Custom House, Sharda House, Jamnagar, Gujarat, for the purpose of adjudicating the matters relating to show cause notice pertaining to Shri Pradip C. Jagada, A-606, Shyam Shikar Building, India Colony, Bapu Nagar, Ahmedabad and others vide F.No. DRI/AZU/INQ-81/2013, dated the 17th April, 2014 by the Additional Director, Directorate of Revenue Intelligence, Ahmedabad Zonal Unit, Ahmedabad. [F.No. 437/55/2014-Cus IV] ( R.P.Singh) Director (Customs) -- 1 of 1 --
